_publications._publicationTitle: Local low-dose lovastatin delivery improves the bone-healing defect caused by Nf1 loss of function in osteoblasts.

_contextSnippet: ...calluses displayed a significant 26% reduction in maximum force endured compared with WT littermate calluses and a 16% reduction in callus stiffness.
details: Measured 26% reduction in maximum force and 16% reduction in callus stiffness in mutant mice via three-point bending
